title: Earnings-date event primary (announcement PREMIUM, not PEAD) + PIT dates from EDGAR 8-K
why: PEAD is dead in large caps (Martineau 2022) but the earnings ANNOUNCEMENT PREMIUM survives specifically in the largest ~500 names (~0.30pct/event VW; Savor-Wilson, Frazzini-Lamont, Disappearing-EAP paper). Event primary fits triple-barrier natively. PIT risk lives in the dates: vendor calendars are backfilled; reconstruct known-when datetimes from EDGAR 8-K (Item 2.02) acceptance timestamps (free, 2003+). days_to/since_earnings also become meta-features everywhere.
scope: EDGAR 8-K ingestion for the 44 tickers via edgartools; acceptance timestamp = knowledge date; BMO/AMC from timestamp
Cross-validate a sample vs FMP/AV calendars to quantify vendor backfill error
phase5_custom primary: +1 entering N days pre-announcement (premium bet); pre-register N and geometry BEFORE any look
days_to_earnings / days_since_earnings meta-features for all primaries
Full Loop A path: DA review of the custom primary code for lookahead (custom code NOT auto-trusted)

history.reason: from advisor consult - build second, weeks 2-3, $0 engineering

EDGAR 8-K Item 2.02 ingestion complete: 43/43 tickers, 87-139 announcements each, 2004->2026 (full audit window). Coverage holes (thin sample, not lookahead): DIS only 29 events 2019+ (did not tag 2.02 earlier), ORCL starts 2006-03. Pre-registration FROZEN at 740bacf BEFORE any data look. Remaining: phase5_earnings_premium module (+adversarial lookahead review, custom code not auto-trusted), days_to/since meta-features, pooled audit.
ingestion + scheduler + pre-registration shipped; primary module next

Custom-primary adversarial review: r1 BLOCK (AMC same-session leak in calendar features; 8-K/A + re-disclosure corruption of scheduler; post-early-actual fires) -> all fixed with tests (effective_knowledge_day 20:00 UTC cutoff; filter_amendments 30d - data shows 35 tickers with sub-30d 2.02 re-disclosures, IBM 52, so the filter is load-bearing; next-actual cap on windows) -> r2 PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT + convention unification applied. Remaining caveats documented: seasonal 1-session conservative deferral for 15-16h ET winter filings (safe direction). READY FOR POOLED AUDIT.
